name: in-darkened-dreams
description: Unofficial interactive character builder for the In Darkened Dreams LARP — build, validate, and save rules-legal characters, with an in-chat builder UI. Single native binary, no runtime required.

tools.name: open_character_builder
tools.description: Open the interactive In Darkened Dreams character builder UI.

tools.name: validate_character
tools.description: Validate an IDD character build against the rules.

tools.name: get_catalog
tools.description: List heritages, factions, and headers with costs.

tools.name: save_character
tools.description: Save a character build to local storage.
